summary_en: 21,501,600 shares (7.59% S/O) acquired for ¥49,999,821,500 under May 2025 board resolution authorizing purchase of up to 37 million shares (13.04% S/O) for maximum ¥5,000 million. Execution window 2 June 2025 – 29 May 2026. Final tranche 816,200 shares for ¥2,247,557,600 settled 1–27 May 2026. Open-market method via TSE. Program complete.
title_en: Notice on Status of Share Acquisition and Completion of Share Acquisition Program
translation_en_brief:
KOITO Manufacturing (Code 7276, TSE Prime) notified completion of its share repurchase program on 28 May 2026. The program was authorized by board resolution on 29 May 2025 with parameters: up to 37 million shares (13.04% of issued shares excluding treasury) and a maximum expenditure of ¥50 billion, executable between 2 June 2025 and 29 May 2026 via open-market purchase on the Tokyo Stock Exchange.

The program reached its authorized spending limit. Total shares acquired under this program: 21,501,600 shares for ¥49,999,821,500. The final tranche of 816,200 shares was acquired for ¥2,247,557,600 between 1–27 May 2026 (trade-settlement basis). The acquisition method throughout was open-market purchase via TSE.

No performance ratios, price ceilings, or stated capital-allocation rationale were disclosed in the filing.
